class.name: PlayFabInventory
class.description: Accessed through [code]PlayFab.inventory[/code]. This service wraps client-safe PlayFab inventory collection, item, transfer, purchase, redemption, and transaction APIs from the GDK PlayFab Services SDK. Methods require a signed-in [PlayFabUser], accept an optional request [Dictionary] using snake_case PlayFab field names, and return a completion [Signal] that emits [PlayFabResult]. Result payloads are converted to Godot Dictionaries and Arrays.

method.name: add_inventory_items_async
method.description: Starts [code]PFInventoryAddInventoryItems[/code] for [param user]. The completed result data is a Dictionary returned by the PlayFab SDK.

method.name: delete_inventory_collection_async
method.description: Starts [code]PFInventoryDeleteInventoryCollection[/code] for [param user]. The completed result data is null on success.

method.name: delete_inventory_items_async
method.description: Starts [code]PFInventoryDeleteInventoryItems[/code] for [param user]. The completed result data is a Dictionary returned by the PlayFab SDK.

method.name: execute_inventory_operations_async
method.description: Starts [code]PFInventoryExecuteInventoryOperations[/code] for [param user]. The completed result data is a Dictionary returned by the PlayFab SDK.

method.name: execute_transfer_operations_async
method.description: Starts [code]PFInventoryExecuteTransferOperations[/code] for [param user]. The completed result data is a Dictionary returned by the PlayFab SDK.

method.name: get_inventory_collection_ids_async
method.description: Starts [code]PFInventoryGetInventoryCollectionIds[/code] for [param user]. The completed result data is a Dictionary returned by the PlayFab SDK.

method.name: get_inventory_items_async
method.description: Starts [code]PFInventoryGetInventoryItems[/code] for [param user]. The completed result data is a Dictionary returned by the PlayFab SDK.

method.name: get_inventory_operation_status_async
method.description: Starts [code]PFInventoryGetInventoryOperationStatus[/code] for [param user]. The completed result data is a Dictionary returned by the PlayFab SDK.

method.name: get_transaction_history_async
method.description: Starts [code]PFInventoryGetTransactionHistory[/code] for [param user]. The completed result data is a Dictionary returned by the PlayFab SDK.

method.name: purchase_inventory_items_async
method.description: Starts [code]PFInventoryPurchaseInventoryItems[/code] for [param user]. The completed result data is a Dictionary returned by the PlayFab SDK.

method.name: redeem_google_play_inventory_items_async
method.description: Starts [code]PFInventoryRedeemGooglePlayInventoryItems[/code] for [param user]. The completed result data is a Dictionary returned by the PlayFab SDK.

method.name: redeem_microsoft_store_inventory_items_async
method.description: Starts [code]PFInventoryRedeemMicrosoftStoreInventoryItems[/code] for [param user]. For this operation, [param request] must include [code]user[/code] with a signed-in GDKUser object; raw local ids are not accepted. The completed result data is a Dictionary returned by the PlayFab SDK.

method.name: redeem_play_station_store_inventory_items_async
method.description: Starts [code]PFInventoryRedeemPlayStationStoreInventoryItems[/code] for [param user]. The completed result data is a Dictionary returned by the PlayFab SDK.

method.name: redeem_steam_inventory_items_async
method.description: Starts [code]PFInventoryRedeemSteamInventoryItems[/code] for [param user]. The completed result data is a Dictionary returned by the PlayFab SDK.

method.name: subtract_inventory_items_async
method.description: Starts [code]PFInventorySubtractInventoryItems[/code] for [param user]. The completed result data is a Dictionary returned by the PlayFab SDK.

method.name: transfer_inventory_items_async
method.description: Starts [code]PFInventoryTransferInventoryItems[/code] for [param user]. The completed result data is a Dictionary returned by the PlayFab SDK.

method.name: update_inventory_items_async
method.description: Starts [code]PFInventoryUpdateInventoryItems[/code] for [param user]. The completed result data is a Dictionary returned by the PlayFab SDK.
